name: App-Configurable Debug Policy + Compatibility
descriptions: App manifest debug policy controls with backward compatibility and P-026 non-regression gates.
success_criteria: Existing apps continue to run unchanged by default.
Manifest-level debug policy is version-gated and safe.
P-026 non-regression expectations hold before default-path switch.

hard_no_go_conditions: app override removes mandatory debug fallback without policy approval
required_commands: uv run pytest tests -k "debug_manifest or legacy_debug_conformance" -q

ci_required_checks: uv run pytest tests -k "debug_manifest or legacy_debug_conformance" -q
